originalTitle: Intrusion Inc. (INTZ) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: Here's Why
summary: In the latest trading session, Intrusion Inc. (INTZ) closed at $0.86, marking a -6.71% move from the previous day.
content:
Intrusion Inc. (INTZ) closed the most recent trading day at $0.86, moving -6.71% from the previous trading session. The stock fell short of the S&P 500, which registered a gain of 0.89% for the day. Elsewhere, the Dow saw an upswing of 0.74%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq appreciated by 1.29%.

Shares of the company witnessed a gain of 28.95% over the previous month, beating the performance of the Computer and Technology sector with its loss of 6.6%, and the S&P 500's loss of 0.63%.

The investment community will be paying close attention to the earnings performance of Intrusion Inc. in its upcoming release. The company is expected to report EPS of -$0.1, unchanged from the prior-year quarter. Meanwhile, the Zacks Consensus Estimate for revenue is projecting net sales of $1.5 million, down 19.79% from the year-ago period.

Looking at the full year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates suggest analysts are expecting earnings of -$0.42 per share and revenue of $7.5 million. These totals would mark changes of +8.7% and +5.69%, respectively, from last year.

Investors should also take note of any recent adjustments to analyst estimates for Intrusion Inc. These latest adjustments often mirror the shifting dynamics of short-term business patterns. Consequently, upward revisions in estimates express analysts' positivity towards the business operations and its ability to generate profits.

Empirical research indicates that these revisions in estimates have a direct correlation with impending stock price performance. To capitalize on this, we've crafted the Zacks Rank, a unique model that incorporates these estimate changes and offers a practical rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, which ranges from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), has an impressive outside-audited track record of outperformance, with #1 stocks generating an average annual return of +25% since 1988. Over the past month, the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate has remained steady. Intrusion Inc. presently features a Zacks Rank of #5 (Strong Sell).

The Computer - Networking industry is part of the Computer and Technology sector. Currently, this industry holds a Zacks Industry Rank of 174, positioning it in the bottom 30% of all 250+ industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank evaluates the power of our distinct industry groups by determining the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks forming the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

Make sure to utilize Zacks.com to follow all of these stock-moving metrics, and more, in the coming trading sessions.

chineseTitle: Intrusion Inc. (INTZ) 股票随着市场上涨而下跌：原因如下
chineseSummary: 在最新的交易日中，Intrusion Inc. (INTZ)收于0.86美元，较前一交易日上涨-6.71%。
chineseContent:
Intrusion Inc. (INTZ)最近一个交易日收盘价为0.86美元，较前一交易日上涨-6.71%。该股的表现低于标准普尔 500 指数，后者当天涨幅为 0.89%。其他方面，道指上涨 0.74%，而以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数则上涨 1.29%。

该公司股价较上月上涨 28.95%，超过了计算机和技术板块下跌 6.6% 的表现，以及标准普尔 500 指数下跌 0.63% 的表现。

投资界将密切关注Intrusion Inc.即将发布的盈利表现。该公司预计每股收益为-0.1 美元，与去年同期持平。与此同时，Zacks 的收入共识预计净销售额为 150 万美元，比去年同期下降 19.79%。

纵观全年，Zacks 一致估计表明分析师预计每股收益为 - 0.42 美元，收入为 750 万美元。这些总数较去年分别增长了+8.7% 和+5.69%。

投资者还应注意分析师对 Intrusion Inc. 预测的近期调整。这些最新调整通常反映了短期业务模式的动态变化。因此，预估的上调表明了分析师对业务运营及其产生利润的能力的积极态度。

实证研究表明，这些预测的修正与即将到来的股价表现直接相关。为了利用这一点，我们精心设计了 Zacks Rank，这是一个独特的模型，融合了这些估计变化并提供了实用的评级系统。

Zacks Rank 系统的范围从#1（强力买入）到#5（强力卖出），具有令人印象深刻的外部审计表现优异记录，自 1988 年以来#1 股票的平均年回报率为 +25%。在过去的一个月里，Zacks 共识 EPS 估计保持稳定。 Intrusion Inc. 目前的 Zacks 排名为#5（强劲销售）。

计算机网络行业是计算机和技术行业的一部分。目前，该行业的 Zacks 行业排名为 174，在所有 250 多个行业中排名垫底 30%。

Zacks 行业排名通过确定构成行业组的个股的平均 Zacks 排名来评估我们不同行业组的实力。我们的研究表明，排名前 50% 的行业的表现比排名后一半的行业高出 2 比 1。

确保利用 Zacks.com 在接下来的交易时段中跟踪所有这些股票变动指标以及更多指标。
